name: list_instances
description: Lists Compute Engine virtual machine (VM) instances. Details for each instance include name, ID, status, machine type, creation timestamp, and attached guest accelerators. Use other tools to get more details about each instance. Requires project and zone as input.

parameters.description: Request message for listing instances basic info.

pageSize.description: Optional. The maximum number of instances to return.

pageToken.description: Optional. A page token received from a previous call to list instances.

project.description: Required. Project ID for this request.

zone.description: Required. The zone of the instances.
